1034384	myuser	192.168.1.80:1234	adventureworks	Query	executing	SELECT soh.SalesOrderID, soh.OrderDate, c.CustomerID, p.Name AS ProductName, sod.OrderQty, sod.LineTotal FROM salesorderheader soh JOIN salesorderdetail sod ON soh.SalesOrderID = sod.SalesOrderID JOIN product p ON sod.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN customer c ON soh.CustomerID = c.CustomerID ORDER BY soh.OrderDate DESC	aaaaaa	17470257762	CPU	0.000012851652	00-4bf92f3577b34da6a3ce929d0e0e4736-00f067aa0ba902b7-01
